name: Longest Substring with At Most K Distinct Characters
description: Given a string s and an integer k, return the length of the longest substring that contains at most k distinct characters.
constraints: 1 <= s.length <= 5 * 10^4. 0 <= k <= 50. s consists of lowercase English letters.

performance.stress_intent: exercise at-most-k-distinct windows over 50k strings that punish repeated distinct recomputation locally
